pitchEn: A real-time messaging app that connects you to the Pupikes chat service. Pick from 15 languages and start chatting once you are online.
newFeaturesEn: First release of Pupikes Chat: real-time messaging in 15 languages with a clean connect/offline experience.

dataHandling.notes: Connects to a live chat server; messages and account data are sent to and stored on the server, so data leaves the device. The app itself stores only the chosen UI language locally.

reviewerRemarksEn: Launch the app; on first run choose a language and tap Start. It connects to the live chat server over the internet, so a working network connection is required. Account/registration steps happen inside the chat itself; no credentials are needed to reach the language screen and connect.
